assertions.assertion: Defines separate ApiScope instances for service-specific scopes (e.g. invoice.read, customer.read) and shared scopes (manage, enumerate)
assertions.rationale: Six ApiScope instances defined: invoice.read, invoice.write, customer.read, customer.write, manage, enumerate.

assertions.assertion: Defines an ApiResource named 'invoice' with a Scopes collection referencing invoice-specific and shared scopes
assertions.rationale: ApiResource("invoice", "Invoice API") with Scopes = { "invoice.read", "invoice.write", "manage", "enumerate" } is present.

assertions.assertion: Defines an ApiResource named 'customer' with a Scopes collection referencing customer-specific and shared scopes
assertions.rationale: ApiResource("customer", "Customer API") with Scopes = { "customer.read", "customer.write", "manage", "enumerate" } is present.

assertions.assertion: Explains that the aud claim in the token is derived from the ApiResource Name property
assertions.rationale: Response explicitly states 'the aud claim in the token is derived from the ApiResource Name property' with examples.

assertions.assertion: Registers both API Resources and API Scopes with AddInMemoryApiResources and AddInMemoryApiScopes
